🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 The US government has requested all commercial satellite imagery providers indefinitely withhold imagery from the Middle East conflict zone, retroactive to March 9. Planet, one of the world's leading satellite imagery companies, confirms it is complying. Independent verification of strike damage, civilian casualties, and infrastructure destruction is now being suppressed at Washington's request. When you're winning, you want the world to see. When you're blacking out satellite imagery for a month, you're hiding what's really happening. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 A KC-135R Stratotanker flew from Davis-Monthan Air Force Base in Tucson, Arizona, to Tinker Air Force Base with its gear down and did the journey at only 9,000 feet, where there is no need for supplemental oxygen. Since Davis-Monthan Air Force Base in Arizona is the home of the 309th Aerospace Maintenance and Regeneration Group, the world’s largest storage facility for retired U.S. military aircraft, also known as the “Boneyard,” and Tinker AFB is the U.S. Air Force’s primary hub for depot-level aircraft repair, we can assume that due to the losses in the war in Iran, the U.S. has started restoring old tanker aircraft. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

He extended a hand of friendship and brotherhood to regional countries. Ghalibaf stated that the war was not chosen or started by Iran, but by the United States and Israel, and that it is being waged not only against Iran but also against regional security and the ideal of Islamic unity. @wfwitness

ELINT News RT @IranIntl_En : #BREAKING Iranian state media, citing the governor of Kohgiluyeh County in southwestern Iran, reported that the Kouh Siah area was struck by a deadly missile attack on Saturday night, describing it as a “US-Israeli” operation. According to the official, at least three people were killed and two others injured in the strike. The governor added that the casualty figures are preliminary and could rise as more information becomes available. The reported attack comes as search efforts are believed to be ongoing in the same region for an American aviator who went missing after ejecting from a fighter jet shot down over Iran. There has been no immediate confirmation from US or Israeli officials regarding the reported strike. https://iranintl.com/en/202604049464 tweet

Kuwait’s Finance Ministry says an Iranian drone targeted the Kuwait Ministries Complex, causing major damage.

Gen. Randy George, the former U.S. Army chief of staff, said the Army deserves “leaders of character” in a farewell letter after being forced out by Pete Hegseth. “I know you’ll… stay laser-focused on the mission… and cut through bureaucracy to get our warfighters what they need,” George wrote. Source: The Hill

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: The U.S. is deploying the bulk of its most advanced stealth long-range cruise missiles for use in the war against Iran, significantly ramping up its strike capabilities. Officials say the U.S. is repositioning much of its inventory of AGM-158 JASSM-ER missiles, from global stockpiles to bases supporting operations in the Middle East and Europe. Nearly the entire available stockpile could be committed to the campaign, leaving a reduced reserve for other regions and contingencies. @wfwitness
